meta.title: Rajasthan Royals vs Gujarat Titans · Qualifier 2
meta.subtitle: IPL 2026 · Maharaja Yadavindra Singh Stadium · 7:30 PM IST
meta.disclaimer: Generated before match start · May not reflect live events

chunks.label: Stakes
chunks.title: A spot in the Grand Final against RCB is at stake

blocks.content: This is a high-stakes knockout match where the winner books a place in the Grand Final against Royal Challengers Bengaluru on May 31. The loser is eliminated from the tournament.
Winner moves on to face RCB in the Grand Final, loser goes home empty-handed.

chunks.label: Season snapshot
chunks.title: Titans look to rebound while Royals ride Eliminator momentum

blocks.content: Gujarat Titans finished the league stage in second place but are looking for a quick reset after a crushing 92-run defeat to RCB in Qualifier 1. Rajasthan Royals advanced after dominant batting from phenom Vaibhav Sooryavanshi cleared out Sunrisers Hyderabad by 47 runs in the Eliminator.

chunks.label: Head-to-head
chunks.title: Titans lead recent history but Royals took the season opener

chunks.label: Recent form
chunks.title: Both teams searching for consistency in high pressure games

blocks.content: Gujarat Titans had a four-match winning streak snapped abruptly by RCB in Qualifier 1 where their bowling conceded a massive 254 runs. Rajasthan Royals ended a four-match losing skid with an emphatic win over SRH in the Eliminator.

chunks.label: Playing XI
chunks.title: Both teams field strong line-ups for the knockout battle

blocks.content: Rajasthan Royals: Yashasvi Jaiswal, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, Dhruv Jurel, Riyan Parag, Donovan Ferreira, Dasun Shanaka, Ravindra Jadeja, Jofra Archer, Nandre Burger, Brijesh Sharma, Yash Punja.
Gujarat Titans: Sai Sudharsan, Shubman Gill, Jos Buttler, Jason Holder, Washington Sundar, Nishant Sindhu, Rashid Khan, Sai Kishore, Kagiso Rabada, Prasidh Krishna, Mohammed Siraj.
Shubman Gill previously carried a minor leg injury while running between wickets in the league stage but continues to lead the side.

chunks.label: Bowling attack
chunks.title: Titans pace stars face Royals explosive new ball threat

blocks.content: Mohammed Siraj and Kagiso Rabada spearhead the Titans' attack alongside spin wizard Rashid Khan. Rajasthan relies on a lethal opening combinations from Jofra Archer and Nandre Burger to damage teams early.

chunks.label: Key matchup
chunks.title: The explosive prodigy meets India's premium pacer

blocks.content: Sooryavanshi has smashed 65 sixes this season. Siraj's ability to pick up early wickets in the powerplay will determine if GT can stall the Royals' explosive 11.66 powerplay run rate.

chunks.label: Venue & conditions
chunks.title: New Chandigarh surface offers consistent carry with rain looming

blocks.content: The surface at Maharaja Yadavindra Singh Stadium in New Chandigarh provides consistent bounce and good carry, helping batsmen get runs early. A slight rain threat looms over the venue for this evening match.
Royals won the toss and elected to bat first to maximize their tournament-best powerplay scoring.

chunks.label: One to watch
chunks.title: 15-year old phenom Sooryavanshi holds the key for Royals

blocks.content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is coming fresh off a brutal, viral 97-run playoff performance against SRH that blew the Eliminator wide open.
